debug_info.goal:
case neg.inl.fstE
n : ℕ
S : Error.Dist n
a b : Error.Agent n
σ : List (Error.Call n)
this : @S b = true
err✝ callee✝ : Error.Agent n
o : Error.maxOne n (Error.Call.fstE n a err✝ callee✝ :: σ)
a_not_know_before_t :
  ¬Error.eval n S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.fstE n a err✝ callee✝) σ o⟩
      (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, true)))
a_not_know_before_f :
  ¬Error.eval n S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.fstE n a err✝ callee✝) σ o⟩
      (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, false)))
a_knows_after_t :
  Error.eval n S ⟨Error.Call.fstE n a err✝ callee✝ :: σ, o⟩ (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, true)))
⊢ failed to pretty print expression (use 'set_option pp.rawOnError true' for raw representation)

failed_attempts:
exfalso
              exact (a_not_know_before_t a_knows_after_t)
            · cases S b <;>  simp_all
            · use S, ⟨σ,⁻o⟩
              simp
              expose_names -- pfoei
              use ⌜a c⌝
              simp
            · intro not_in_callee not_a_knows T τ same_len equ C role_C same_contrib
              cases h_b : S b
              all_goals
                simp_all
              -- ???
              -- How do we know that `S b = T b` here?
              sorry
          all_goals
            sorry

(h1:=rfl) (h2:=by simpa [OSequence.length_def] using same_len) equ
              simpa [this] using this

have hb' : S b = T b := by
                  simpa [h_b] using (know_self (a := b) _ _ _ this same_len equ)
                cases h_b <;> simp [hb'] at this)

· exfalso
                exact this (by simpa [h_b] using rfl)

have hb_eq : T b = S b := by
                have := know_self (n := n) (a := a) (S := S) (T := T)
                  (m := (⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.fstE n a err✝ callee✝) σ o⟩ : Error.OSequence n).length)
                  (σ := ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.fstE n a err✝ callee✝) σ o⟩)
                  (τ := τ.1) rfl (by simpa [Error.OSequence.length_def] using same_len) equ.1
                simpa using this
              subst h_b
              simpa [hb_eq] using this
          all_goals
            sorry
